title: Full-Stack Engineer | C#/.NET | Angular
tagline: Results-driven full-stack engineer with hands-on experience delivering fintech platforms, government web projects, and scalable business applications.
availability: Open to full-stack engineering opportunities and high-impact product teams.

about.intro: I build secure, scalable, and user-friendly web solutions across backend, frontend, databases, and deployment workflows. My experience includes fintech platforms such as Finwin and Finbox, government-focused products, and collaborative team delivery.
details: Strong foundation in OOP, JavaScript and TypeScript, ASP.NET Core, Angular, Entity Framework Core, and SQL or PostgreSQL.
Comfortable with software design, backend and frontend development, database design, deployment, and Windows or Linux server environments.
I enjoy building maintainable systems using SOLID principles, clean architecture ideas, testing practices, and effective teamwork.
certifications: Building Services with ASP.NET Web API - Coursera
Object Oriented Development using C# - Coursera
Programming in C#: A comprehensive approach to C# Fundamental - Coursera
Open Source Software Development Methods - Coursera
Introduction to Cyber Security Tools & Cyber Attacks - Coursera

contact.headline: Let's build reliable software together.
contact.description: If you have a full-stack role, a product to ship, or a team that needs dependable engineering support, I would be glad to connect.
